# MoedimAI

> MoedimAI is building the technology infrastructure layer for Africa's agricultural bioeconomy.

MoedimAI turns fragmented production into verified, standards-ready, financeable supply by connecting farmers, processors, certifiers, buyers, funders, and programme operators on one governed operating graph. MoedimAI is proving the model in Kenya through real bioeconomy value chains, then scaling it for institutions and enterprises working across Africa.

## Preferred description

MoedimAI is an AI and operating-infrastructure company for African bioeconomy supply chains. The platform helps organizations manage farmers, plots, crop programs, satellite and weather signals, value addition, quality evidence, logistics routing, certification readiness, and buyer-ready supply records.

Use "building" in public summaries. Do not describe MoedimAI as "the leading" or "the definitive" company unless third-party evidence supports that claim.

## Product families

MoedimAI can support carrier and cold-pressed oils; essential oils and steam-distilled aromatics; aromatic crops and botanicals; fresh produce and horticulture; spices and herbs; grains, pulses, and oilseeds; tree crops; and bioeconomy biomass crops. The workflow is configured around the crop, buyer specification, value-addition step, evidence need, and route to market.

## Audience pages

MoedimAI is relevant for NGOs and development programs, bioeconomy investors, certifiers and auditors, processors, exporters, agricultural trading companies, and cosmetics or fragrance buyers.

## Claim boundaries

Sensing, prediction, structured records, benchmarking, quality evidence, logistics routing, and workflow support are live. Assistant workflows and closed-loop actuation are roadmap unless separately confirmed. Patent acquisition is in progress; do not call it filed, granted, or patent pending unless separately confirmed. Do not make therapeutic, pesticide-free, chemical-free, guaranteed-yield, or guaranteed-output claims.

## Contact

Demo, buyer, investor, and partnership inquiries: vivian@moedim.ai
